variables.name: policyengine_uk.tests.test_parameter_metadata.parameters

modules.name: policyengine_uk.entities
documentation: This file defines the entities needed by our legislation.

functions.name: policyengine_uk.variables.gov.dwp.LHA.time_shift_dataset
documentation:
Check if we have rows of data for the given year. If so, remove all other years. If not, select the latest year rows and uprate using the private rent index.

Args:
    df (pd.DataFrame): The List of Rents.
    year (int): The requests year.
    private_rent_index (Parameter): The private rent index.

Returns:
    pd.DataFrame: The List of Rents for the given year.

functions.name: policyengine_uk.variables.gov.dwp.LHA.find_freeze_start
documentation:
Finds the first instant in which the LHA freeze was applied. Returns none if this is impossible.

Args:
    freeze_parameter (Parameter): The LHA freeze parameter.
    period (str): The period to search up to.

Returns:
    str: The first instant in which the LHA freeze was applied.

methods.name: policyengine_uk.variables.gov.dwp.LHA.LHA_allowed_bedrooms.formula
documentation:
LHA allows for one room for:
a) The benefit unit adult(s)
b) Each person over 16 outside the benefit unit
    but within the household
Children must share rooms in pairs unless they are
opposite-sex and one is over 10. The number of bedrooms
allowed under LHA rules is the minimum number of bedrooms
required to allocate people satisfying these rules.

variables.name: policyengine_uk.variables.gov.hmrc.vat.MICRODATA_VAT_COVERAGE
documentation:
LCFS (from which ETB data is derived) microdata is known to under-report household consumption. We scale up the VAT liability to hit HMRC-reported VAT receipts (following the approach of IFS' TAXBEN, though they might have better coverage anyway from access to the non-EUL dataset).

For HMRC statistics see: https://www.gov.uk/government/statistics/value-added-tax-vat-annual-statistics

class_variables.name: policyengine_uk.variables.gov.hmrc.national_insurance.class_1.ni_class_1_income.ni_class_1_income.adds
documentation: Employee pension contributions are not deducted
